description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa upholstered in a deep blue material, featuring a minimalist and boxy silhouette. The sofa has two loose, matching blue throw pillows placed at each end, adding comfort and a touch of softness to the otherwise structured form. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a cohesive and geometric profile. The backrest is straight, continuous, and slightly rounded at the top, providing full back support without any visible segmentation or tufting. The seat appears to be a single, uniform cushion, seamlessly integrated with the rest of the sofa. The base and legs are not distinctly visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden leg design that emphasizes the sofa's clean lines and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, deep blue two-seater sofa with broad, straight armrests and two matching throw pillows. The design is minimalist, with a single seat cushion and a continuous, straight backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sofa's broad armrests, straight backrest, single seat cushion, and two blue throw pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, thick armrest, and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned backrest and the tops of the two throw pillows at each end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest, seat depth, and pillow placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, uniform seat cushion and two loose, matching throw pillows placed at each end; no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at seat height, rectangular profile, fully upholstered in matching blue fabric, no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design that gives a low-profile appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest of medium height, slightly rounded at the top, fully upholstered, no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue upholstery with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
